rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance Of P. Miranda At Disposition And Compel Production Of Documents And For Reasonab;E Attorney Fees And Expenses; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of R.A. Canatella With Exhibits; Propf Of Mail Service.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, May 30, 2008. Petitioner Debra Dolch's motion to compel attendance of at deposition and production of documents of Pedro Miranda is granted. The deposition shall be completed on or before September 5. 2008. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. = (610/BEC)
